arts.ttl: Champions League table as it stands after Arsenal win as Liverpool top and Man City struggling
arts.sum: Teams that have secured a top-eight finish include Liverpool and Barcelona, while those who have made it to the knockouts include Arsenal, Inter, Atletico Madrid, AC Milan, Atalanta, Bayer Leverkusen, Aston Villa, Monaco, Feyenoord, Lille, Brest, Dortmund, Bayern Munich, Real Madrid, Juventus and Celtic. Arne Slot's team remains undefeated in the competition, boasting seven consecutive victories over AC Milan, Bologna, RB Leipzig, Bayer Leverkusen, Real Madrid, Girona and Lille.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star says goodbyes after playing final ever game at Emirates Stadium
arts.sum: His cameo against Dinamo was his 128th appearance for the Gunners and it could be his final - at least at home - in an Arsenal shirt as his move to Celtic edges ever closer. Tierney received a warm reception from the Arsenal fans as he entered the pitch - an unsurprising welcome considering the service he has given over the last five-and-a-half years.

arts.ttl: Arsenal set for anxious wait as star undergoes knee scan after training injury
arts.sum: Arsenal's injury problems continue to stack up with Myles Lewis-Skelly having to undergo a scan on his knee after the teenager failed to finish training on Tuesday

arts.ttl: Rice fires Arsenal into early lead against Dinamo Zagreb
arts.sum: Declan Rice gives Arsenal an early lead in the Champions League, as he scores within the first two minutes to put them 1-0 up against Dinamo Zagreb.
